pyqgis_plugin.name: RORB Builder
pyqgis_plugin.description: Full RORB rainfall-runoff routing model from shapefiles with batch design storm analysis and results viewer
pyqgis_plugin.about: v2.3: Adds RORB Results Viewer — reads a folder of RORBWin .out files (one per AEP/Duration/TP), auto-parses filenames, plots all temporal patterns with per-TP toggles and mean-peak reference line, highlights representative TP per ARR 2016 Book 4 Ch3 s2.3, and exports critical duration hydrographs to CSV. v2.1: Validated RORB routing engine (NSE~0.9999 vs RORBWin). Batch design storm workflow: Network check > ARR TXT > IFD CSV > Temporal Pattern CSV > Parameters > Run all AEP x Duration x TP combinations. Auto-computes critical duration and representative TP. Results table + hydrograph viewer + export CSV.
